title: ATOM: Another Tomato Oriented Mod
description: ATOM is my excuse to learn Blockbench and at the same time add random things to Minecraft in order for me to justify wasting my time.
body:
# *ATOM*: *A*nother  *T*omato  *O*riented  *M*od

ATOM is my excuse to learn Blockbench and at the same time add random things to Minecraft in order for me to justify wasting my time.

### Features

*You can acquire all seeds through the grass loot table!*

While the mod is still in development, it currently adds:

- Tomatoes
- Seed Bags
- Corn
